mapper.select: select r.id, r.scheme_version_id, r.rule_code, r.rule_name, r.rule_type, r.trigger_code, r.scope_fonds_code, r.scope_category_code, r.scope_object_type_id, r.scope_archive_level, r.scope_event_type_id, r.priority, r.condition_json, r.status, r.enabled, r.published_by, r.published_at, r.version, r.created_by, r.created_at, r.updated_by, r.updated_at from am_archive_rule_definition r left join am_archive_ontology_object_type ot on ot.id = r.scope_object_type_id and ot.deleted_flag = false left join am_archive_ontology_event_type et on et.id = r.scope_event_type_id and et.deleted_flag = false where r.deleted_flag = false and r.scheme_version_id = #{criteria.schemeVersionId} and r.trigger_code = #{criteria.triggerCode} and r.status = 'PUBLISHED' and r.enabled = true and (r.scope_fonds_code is null or r.scope_fonds_code = #{criteria.fondsCode}) and (r.scope_category_code is null or r.scope_category_code = #{criteria.categoryCode}) and (r.scope_archive_level is null or r.scope_archive_level = #{criteria.archiveLevel}) and (r.scope_object_type_id is null or ot.type_code = #{criteria.objectTypeCode}) and (r.scope_event_type_id is null or et.event_code = #{criteria.eventCode}) order by r.priority, r.rule_code, r.id
